note: Live/non-live registry for Observatory panels. The autonomous /goal loop EDITS this file (it is NOT frozen) to promote a panel to "live" — but only after that panel's *.demo.test.tsx (calling describeLivePanel) plus the panel-golden + pipeline-coupling gates pass. ZERO panels are live at the verifier baseline (Codex r6#3), so every panel gate passes vacuously here. verify:complete additionally requires all four required panels live.
